SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT "category"."CategoryID", "CategoryName", "ProductName", "ProductID" FROM "Demo".."Categories" "category" JOIN "Demo".."Products" "product" ON "product"."CategoryID" = "category"."CategoryID" FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT "CategoryID", "CategoryName", (SELECT "ProductName" FROM "Demo".."Products" WHERE "CategoryID" = "category"."CategoryID" FOR XML PATH('product')) AS "Products" FROM "Demo".."Categories" "category" FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT "category"."CategoryID", "CategoryName", (SELECT "ProductName", "ProductID" FROM "Demo".."Products" WHERE "CategoryID" = "category"."CategoryID" FOR XML PATH('product')) AS "Products" FROM "Demo".."Categories" "category" WHERE "CategoryID" IN (SELECT DISTINCT "CategoryID" FROM "Demo".."Products") FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_schema('SELECT * FROM (SELECT "CategoryID", "CategoryName" FROM "Demo".."Categories" UNION SELECT "CategoryID", "CategoryName" FROM "Demo".."Categories" WHERE "CategoryID" < 3) AS "UnionCategories" FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');
